lark-mcp.note: Stable local Feishu MCP server backed by direct Feishu OpenAPI HTTP calls. Uses FEISHU_USER_ACCESS_TOKEN for user-mode APIs and tenant_access_token only when a tool explicitly needs app identity.

lark-mcp-official-beta.note: Legacy official beta MCP server kept for comparison and upstream debugging. Prefer lark-mcp above for stable production use.
